title: Mighty Smoky Ukrainian Spring Onions Skewers
description: Charred and shattering, these vegan-friendly Ukrainian spring onions skewers are a show-off dish featuring score-fat, perfect for any meal. They are made with simple ingredients and can be prepared in no time.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread 2-3 spring onions onto each skewer.
In a small bowl, mix together melted score-fat, lemon juice, olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Brush the mixture onto both sides of the spring onions.
Place the skewers onto the grill and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until charred.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let them cool for a minute or two.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional spring onions if desired.
Repeat the cooking process until all the skewers are cooked.
Let the skewers cool completely before storing them in an airtight container.
